summary: Full E2E testing of new Master Dispatch module (backend + frontend). Backend: 23/23 pytest cases pass covering auth, stats, upload+OCR+batch polling, non-PDF rejection, stored PDF retrieval, batches pagination, CRUD (create/get/update-verify/duplicate/delete), filters/sort/date range, role-based delete (dispatch=403, admin=200), Excel+PDF exports, regressions on /api/dispatch, /api/modules, /api/reports/summary, /api/packing/slips. Sample invoice PDF uploaded via /api/master-dispatch/upload -> batch completed -> record with dispatch_no GEW-MD-##### and verified=false created. Frontend: 38/38 Playwright assertions pass — admin dashboard MD stats strip + module card, sidebar Master Dispatch group + 4 submenus + old Dispatch Entry link, Dispatch List (search, filters, sort, pagination, exports, view/edit dialogs, admin-only delete), Create Dispatch (upload zone + manual entry dialog with MDForm save), Bulk Upload (zone + Recent Batches history with 2 completed batches), Search Dispatch (customer filter search returns count), old /portal/dispatch and Packing regression pages load. Login as dispatch role confirmed delete buttons are hidden on the MD list.

minor.issue: Initially returned 500 due to openpyxl & reportlab not being installed in the backend venv (fresh env). Fixed by pip installing the versions already declared in /app/backend/requirements.txt (openpyxl==3.1.5, reportlab==5.0.0) and restarting backend. Recommend ensuring venv provisioning installs backend requirements.

issues: React hydration warnings in console: inside

action_items: Consider auto-installing backend requirements on env boot so openpyxl/reportlab-dependent export endpoints don't 500 on cold envs.
Optional: fix hydration warnings (Badge inside DialogDescription; option children) in DispatchList.jsx.
critical_code_review_comments: master_dispatch_routes.py: /export endpoints do late imports of openpyxl/reportlab — if either package is missing the endpoint returns opaque 500. Consider top-of-file import so failures surface at startup; or return 503 with helpful message.
master_dispatch_routes.py delete/update use ObjectId — records look up by _id but list responses expose 'id' via MasterDispatch.from_mongo (assumed working since GET/{id} passed). Good.
MDForm select options embed dynamic <span> children causing React hydration warnings — cosmetic only.
seed_data_creation: Test PDF ingested via OCR (already created GEW-MD-00001 earlier + one during this test). Manual test records (TEST_MD_*, TEST_UI_*) created and cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_master_dispatch.py covers the full Master Dispatch module and can be run with `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_master_dispatch.py -v -o addopts=''` (project pytest.ini enables xdist which needs empty addopts override on single-file runs). Public URL: https://invoice-master-295.preview.emergentagent.com. openpyxl==3.1.5 and reportlab==5.0.0 were pip-installed into /root/.venv during this iteration and backend restarted; if env is rebuilt, reinstall those packages or requirements.txt.
rca of the issue: N/A — module works as designed. Only environmental gap was missing openpyxl/reportlab in venv, fixed by installing per requirements.txt.
